text: The dashboard project detail endpoint (/api/dashboard/project/:code) uses serializeProject (full formData, no summary) while the project list endpoint uses serializeDashboardProject (summary only, no formData). Any client-side function that reads status from project data must handle BOTH shapes: when summary is present trust it; when only formData is present validate the raw fields. The getDashboardEnergyCertificateSummary fallback path was trusting raw formData.energyCertificate.status without field validation — causing green tick for stale/incomplete projects in the detail modal.
issue: Dashboard detail modal showed green EC tick for projects with status='completed' but missing required fields, because the detail API returns raw formData without a pre-validated summary
